hero.title:
Know Exactly Who's
Visa-Ready, Today
hero.subtitle: One dashboard for every organisation managing relocations — employers moving staff, universities tracking international students, agencies handling clients. Consent-first, real data, no spreadsheets.
org_types.title: Built for every organisation that moves people
org_types.employer.title: Employers & HR Teams
org_types.employer.desc: Moving staff overseas? See every employee's relocation visa readiness in one view — without chasing email threads or asking for documents you're not allowed to hold.
org_types.university.title: Universities & Colleges
org_types.university.desc: International students arrive from dozens of countries every intake. Track their visa readiness by cohort, by faculty, or by target arrival date — with their full consent.
org_types.agency.title: Recruitment Agencies
org_types.agency.desc: Managing candidates who need work visas? Show clients a live readiness view without exposing private application data. A professional handoff, not a spreadsheet.
org_types.lawfirm.title: Immigration Law Firms
org_types.lawfirm.desc: Give clients a structured way to track their own progress. See overall readiness at a glance without holding sensitive documents yourself.
features.title: What you actually get
features.0.title: One Cohort, One View
features.0.desc: See every member's readiness in a single dashboard — employees, students, or candidates — not a dozen email threads.
features.1.title: Consent-First by Design
features.1.desc: A member's status is only ever visible after they explicitly accept your invite. Nothing is assumed or inferred.
features.2.title: A Real Pipeline, Not a Spreadsheet
features.2.desc: Track everyone through Invited → Accepted → In Progress → Ready → Relocated. Move cards or update rows — your choice.
features.3.title: Compliance Export, On Demand
features.3.desc: Export a live readiness report for HR, legal, or the student services office whenever you need one. Never stale, never fabricated.
steps.title: From signup to a full cohort view in 3 steps
steps.0.title: Create Your Organisation
steps.0.desc: Sign up and create your employer, university, or agency account in under a minute.
steps.1.title: Invite Your People
steps.1.desc: Add each person's email — employees, students, or clients. They get a real invite, not a forced enrollment.
steps.2.title: They Choose to Connect
steps.2.desc: Once they accept and link their relocation checklist, their readiness appears in your dashboard.
consent.title: What you will never see without consent
consent.body: No financial answers. No risk-score breakdown. No document contents. Only an overall readiness percentage and a simple status — and only for members who explicitly accepted your invite.
anonymous.title: Set up your organisation — free account, 30 seconds
anonymous.body: Create a free account to add your first cohort member, send invites, and track readiness from day one. No card required.
anonymous.signin: Already have an account? Sign in
agent_card.title: Work with a consultant who knows your route
agent_card.body: Verified immigration professionals who help companies and universities structure their relocation process — from policy review to individual application support.
cta.title: Ready to see your cohort?
cta.subtitle: Free to start. No card required.
onboarding.type_label: What kind of organisation is this?
onboarding.title: Create Your Organisation
onboarding.subtitle: This becomes your dashboard's name — you can invite your first members right after.
onboarding.create_failed: Failed to create organisation. Please try again.
onboarding.signin_body: Sign in or create an account to set up your organisation's dashboard.
dashboard.invite_failed: Failed to send invite. Please try again.
dashboard.private_notes_desc: Only visible to your organisation — never shown to the member.
dashboard.empty_cohort_employer: Invite your first employee to see your cohort build up here.
dashboard.empty_cohort_university: Invite your first student to see your cohort build up here.
dashboard.empty_cohort: Invite your first member to see your cohort build up here.
invite.checklist_question: Which checklist is for this relocation?
invite.checklist_scope_note: {{org}} will only ever see this one trip's readiness — not any other saved checklist you have.
invite.no_checklists: You don't have any saved checklists yet. Create one first, then come back to this link to finish accepting.
invite.wants_follow: {{org}} wants to follow your visa readiness
invite.wants_track: {{org}} wants to track your visa readiness
invite.accept_body: If you accept, they'll see your overall readiness % and a simple status for one checklist you choose. Never your financial answers, risk score breakdown, or documents. You can disconnect at any time.
invite.not_found_body: This invite link is invalid. Please ask whoever sent it to resend it.
invite.status_other: This invite is no longer active.
invite.signin_body: Sign in with {{email}} to accept or decline this invite from {{org}}.
invite.wrong_account_title: This Invite Isn't for Your Account
invite.wrong_account_body: This invite was sent to {{email}}. Please sign in with that email to respond.
